name: StudyTrack Dev Container
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; sudo apt-get update; sudo apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl ca-certificates gnupg software-properties-common apt-transport-https git unzip xz-utils zip libglu1-mesa; if ! command -v supabase >/dev/null 2>&1; then sudo install -d -m 0755 /etc/apt/keyrings; curl -fsSL https://apt.supabase.com/gpg.key | sudo gpg --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/supabase.gpg; echo "deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/supabase.gpg] https://apt.supabase.com stable main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/supabase.list >/dev/null; sudo apt-get update; sudo apt-get install -y supabase; fi; if ! command -v az >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -sL https://aka.ms/InstallAzureCLIDeb | sudo bash; fi; if [ ! -d /usr/local/flutter ]; then sudo git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git -b stable /usr/local/flutter; fi; sudo chown -R $(id -u):$(id -g) /usr/local/flutter; export FLUTTER_HOME=/usr/local/flutter; export PATH=/usr/local/flutter/bin:/usr/local/flutter/bin/cache/dart-sdk/bin:$PATH; flutter config --no-analytics; flutter doctor -v'
